title: Horror Ambience Music: Echoes
description: Replaces all of Minecraft's music with Dark atmospheric soundscapes
body:
![HAM E](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a1b4bad89011a1df96debad57c92a3729b86107_0.webp)

This Resource pack replaces all of Minecraft's music with dark atmospheric suspenseful music

aiming for more subtle music with slow buildup's other than loud blaring cheap horror music

If you are looking to build atmosphere with a horror modpack you are building look no further

# **PREVIEW**

# **ARTIST CREDIT**

**Co.Ag**

We cannot defend you

underwater inspired by taboo

are you in here

3am

a place hidden from god

do the lies you told seem shameful

the swing

piano in an empty room

no birds sing

your outer world

red tears

the blood witch she moves

we drift in the night

dark ambience horror soundscape
